name: Six Strike - Sextuple Barrage
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>六</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ろく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>武</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぶ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>式</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>真</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>伝</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>でん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>六</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ろく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>段</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>衝</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Six Warriors Style True Legendary Heavenly Demon Six-Step Impact
desc: If you control 3 or more "Six Samurai" Synchro Monsters with different names (for every 6 Bushido Counters you control, reduce this number by 1): Destroy all cards your opponent controls. If this Set card in its owner's control is destroyed or banished by an opponent's activated effect: You can Special Summon 1 "Six Samurai" monster or 1 "Shien" Effect Monster from your Deck/Extra Deck. You can only use each effect of "Six Strike - Sextuple Barrage" once per turn.
eff: If you control 3 or more "Six Samurai" Synchro Monsters with different names (for every 6 Bushido Counters you control, reduce this number by 1): Destroy all cards your opponent controls. If this Set card in its owner's control is destroyed or banished by an opponent's activated effect: You can Special Summon 1 "Six Samurai" monster or 1 "Shien" Effect Monster from your Deck/Extra Deck. You can only use each effect of "Six Strike - Sextuple Barrage" once per turn.

summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
